response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Discrepancy detected. The reference JSON expected the song 'Chou Yume Dodekkai!' to be performed, but the video is actually a free preview portion that cuts to a static ending screen at 00:35.000. 2. JSON Usage: Discarded the reference lyrics entirely as no song vocals are present. Manually transcribed the introductory spoken MC talk and the prominent on-screen text. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed the spoken dialogue at the beginning with high precision, then added a subtitle for the prominent on-screen message starting at 00:35.000, and remained silent for the rest of the video during the instrumental EDM track.

subtitles.original: じゃ、ここからね、さっき言った通り、本当のミッション始まりますよね！
subtitles.english: Well then, from here on, just like we said earlier, the real mission is going to begin!

subtitles.original: おーい！まだ声出せるよなー！
subtitles.english: Hey! You can still make some noise, right?!

subtitles.original: ここにいる全員、そして配信のみんな！覚悟はいいかー！
subtitles.english: Everyone here, and everyone watching the stream! Are you ready?!

subtitles.original: ファーストミッション、ここからが本番だー！
subtitles.english: First Mission, the real show starts now!

subtitles.original: 無料パートは終了いたしました！ご視聴ありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: The sneak peek part of the show has ended. Thank you for watching.
